message:
test(fcp-core): add policy denial vectors + deterministic TaintFlags serialization

Policy Engine test coverage expansion:
- Add decision_vector_denies_connector_deny: Tests ZonePolicyConnectorDenied
  when connector matches connector_deny patterns
- Add decision_vector_denies_capability_deny: Tests ZonePolicyCapabilityDenied
  when capability matches capability_deny patterns
- Add decision_vector_denies_missing_execution_approval: Tests
  ExecutionApprovalRequired when operation needs human approval but
  no valid ApprovalToken provided
- Generate corresponding CBOR golden vectors for cross-language
  compatibility testing

Provenance module improvements for deterministic serialization:
- Change TaintFlags internal storage from HashSet to BTreeSet
  This ensures CBOR/JSON serialization produces identical byte output
  regardless of insertion order, critical for:
  - Content-addressed hashing of provenance records
  - Golden vector test reproducibility
  - Cross-implementation compatibility
- Add Ord + PartialOrd derives to TaintFlag enum to support BTreeSet
- Make TaintFlags::new() const for compile-time initialization

Test vectors added:
- vectors/policy/decision_deny_capability.cbor
- vectors/policy/decision_deny_connector.cbor
- vectors/policy/decision_deny_missing_execution.cbor
- vectors/provenance/provenance_merge.cbor (updated for deterministic order)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
